text.title: agent-invocation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agent-invocation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using subagent_type="faion-research-agent (mode: market)" expecting it to dispatch to a market-specific agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Claude Code resolves subagent_type against the literal name field in agent frontmatter. The parenthetical is ignored or causes a lookup failure. Pass mode in the prompt.

failure-mode.description: Launching 9 parallel Task calls for all research modes simultaneously.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Nothing prevents parallel launch in code. The result is shared WebSearch quota exhaustion, HTTP 429 errors, partial outputs, and corrupted .aidocs/product_docs/ state. Use sequential execution enforced by the orchestrator.

failure-mode.description: Accepting G2, Capterra, or Trustpilot URLs without WebFetch verification.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models invent plausible-looking slugs (g2.com/products/plausible-name) that return 404. Require a WebFetch round-trip for every URL before it appears in output.

failure-mode.description: Running pricing mode without specifying geography.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without geography the agent returns US-default pricing; EU/UA markets differ by ~30%. Always pass geography explicitly.

failure-mode.description: Creating personas from pains mode output that has no source cap.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a cap (e.g. "top 10 pains, 3+ sources each") agents return 40+ pains with thin sourcing. Cap in the prompt; gate personas on pains existing first.

failure-mode.description: Reading all 9 mode output files into one executive-summary prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Nine verbose deep-run files total 60-100k tokens. Summarize each file to 2k tokens first, then synthesize the summaries.

failure-mode.description: Using WebSearch alone for competitors or market modes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: WebSearch returns snippets; modes like competitors need full pricing pages. Include WebFetch in the allowed-tools list alongside WebSearch.
